name: Paradise Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve jello in hot water and let cool.
2. Stir in sour cream until smooth.
3. Fold in cottage cheese and 1 cup of the crushed pineapple.
4. Pour mixture into a 1-quart mold and chill until firm.
5. Once set, remove from mold and serve over salad greens.
6. Garnish with orange slice rings or remaining crushed pineapple.
